title: Principal Plant Manager at Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited:
Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited!
